titleStmt.title: SII 41.154: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 154. (A.R. No. 153 of 1905.) Modakkūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the south wall of the central shrine the Meypporuḷ-natha-svamin temple at Moḍakkūr.

summary.p: Records a king's order to the trustees of many temples in his territory that he had relinquished the taxes oṭṭachchu, vēṇḍukōḷ, etc that the temples were paying to the government and that they need not pay them to any of his officers and the local rulers. The temples included those at Tiruppāṇḍikkoḍumuḍi, Karuvūr, Veñjamākkūḍal, Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Aviṉāsi, Tirumukkūḍal, Maṉṉiyūr, and others in Naraiyaṉūr-nāḍu, Poṅgalūrkkāl-nāḍu, Talaiyūr-nāḍu, Maṇalūr-nāḍu, Araiyanāḍu, Kiḻaṅga-nāḍu, Veṅgāla-nāḍu, etc. in Vaḍa-Koṅgu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉerimaikoṇṭāṉ vaṭakoṅkil naraiyaṉūr nāṭṭu Aṭikkiḻttaḷamum poṅkalūrkkāl kiraṉūr Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷum Alaṅkiyam taṉi l poṅkalūrkkālnāṭu talaiyūrnāṭu vaṭakarai maṇalūrnāṭu Araiyanāṭu kiḻaṅkanāṭu veṅkālanāṭu taṭṭaiyūrnāṭu Iṭaippuḻutināṭu kāṅkākavanāṭu viracoḻavaḷanāṭu valuppunāṭu kuṟupunāṭu
vaṭaparicāranāṭu kāñcikkūvalnāṭu pūnturaiṉāṭu kiḻppāliṉāṭu vaṭakaraināṭu Innāṭukaḷil civabrāhmaṇak kāṇiyāḷaṟkum tānattārkkum tiruppāṇṭikkoṭumuṭi tāṉatatāṟkum karuvūril tāṉattāṟkum veñcamākkūṭal tāṉattāṟkum tirumurukanpūṇṭit tāṉattāṟkum Aviṉāciāḷuṭaiyār koyil tāṉattāṟkum tirumukkūṭal tāṉattāṟkum maṉṉiyūr tāṉattāṟkum namolai kuṭutta(p)paṭi
kaḷāl Uḷḷa Oṭṭuaccu Iḻaṉtom kūttāṭuṉāyanāṟkut tāṅkaḷ Iṭṭukkuṭutta Amaippiṉpaṭikku namolai yiṭṭut taṇṭak kaṭavatallavākavum nāṭupiṭitta cāmantarkaḷukkut tāṅkaḷ kuṭuttuvarum veṇṭukoḷ kuṭukkak kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum namolai Eṭuttuvarummavarkaḷukku nam
paṇaṅ kuṭuttup potuvārkaḷākavum namtūtaṟku vaḻivaravu coṟu Iṭakkaṭavarkaḷallavākavum Ivarkaḷukku kaiyarici Erittiṭak kaṭavarallavākavum Ippaṇam Iraṇṭum paṇam kuṭuttuppotum Ūrkaḷ Iṟuttup potuvārkaḷākavum Itukku namakku Ivarkaḷ tanta Accu Aṟunūṟ
pāṭāka kuṭuttamaikku patuvārar Accu tarakkaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭikku cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikkup piṭipāṭāka namolai kuṭuttom Ivai toṇṭaimān Eḻuttu Ivai kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Āṇṭu 3 Āvatu .
Digital edition of SII 41.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
